winner: I told my laptop I was washing it, but it just said "Please confirm before proceeding." I said, "I'm washing it," and it replied, "You can't wash me." So I did—it still works, just a little wetter.

candidates.text: My laptop asked me to wash my hands before using it, so I gave it a spin cycle and now it's just a wet screen with a 504 error.

candidates.text: Why did my laptop get mad at me for washing it? Because I told it to "wash its hands" of my problems, but then it started giving me error messages about dirty laundry!

candidates.text: I tried to wash my laptop with soap and water, but it just made the screen look like a sudsy mess. Turns out, you can't "wash" your problems away with a laptop either—it's not a dishwasher!
